title: USDC Relationship Spec Mapping Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/relationship-spec.contract.json — the relationship spec field set and per-kind admission (which excludes attribute-only fields such as variability), listOp subfield rules, and authored target storage are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds the USDC-specific mapping: Crate spec form 8 -> relationship spec, per-field name resolution, and per-field Crate value-representation type bindings.

storage_mapping.rule: A SPECS entry with form=8 produces a relationship spec at the property path resolved through PATHS. Authored fields come from the FIELDSETS group whose start is given by the SPECS entry's field_set_index.

field_resolution.custom: FIELDS token name 'custom'; value type 1 (bool) inlined. Defaults to false when absent.
field_resolution.targetPaths: FIELDS token name 'targetPaths'; value type 34 (PathListOp). Subfields (explicit/prepend/append/delete/reorder) decoded per crate-value-representations.contract.json#list_ops. Items are uint32 path indices into PATHS.
field_resolution.customData: FIELDS token name 'customData'; value type 31 (dictionary) offset-backed
field_resolution.hidden: FIELDS token name 'hidden'; value type 1 (bool) inlined

forbidden_field_enforcement.rule: Per document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission, a relationship spec admits only shared + relationship_only + custom; any other field-name token (including variability) is rejected. In the USDC encoding this is enforced by the field-name token: a FIELDS entry whose token name is one of {variability, typeName, default, connectionPaths, timeSamples, spline, allowedTokens, colorSpace, payload, references, inheritPaths, specializes, variantSetNames, variantSelection, subLayers, relocates, layerRelocates, defaultPrim, framesPerSecond, timeCodesPerSecond, startTimeCode, endTimeCode, customLayerData, noLoadHint, permission, prefix, suffix, symmetricPeer, symmetryArguments, symmetryFunction} attached to a form-8 spec is a contract violation (the final group are AOUSD §7.6.5.2 / §7.6.3.4 deprecated tokens, now rejected under strict spec conformance). The parser must emit a MalformedUsdcSection diagnostic.
forbidden_field_enforcement.variability_specifically: Variability is forbidden on relationship specs even though Crate could encode it (the type 44 Variability value rep is well-defined). The current usdc_parser.cpp already has a 'kind == relationship' guard that skips variability writes; this contract pins that guard as a law.

laws: a Crate SPECS entry with form=8 produces exactly one relationship spec at the property path resolved through PATHS
targetPaths is decoded from PathListOp (type 34) with subfields per crate-value-representations.contract.json#list_ops
a single-item explicit listOp for targetPaths is preserved as such in document-model storage; the parser does not collapse a single-item explicit into a bare path
None target authoring (an empty listOp) is preserved as an empty explicit listOp
relationship specs reject the variability field even when a FIELDS entry binds the 'variability' token to a form-8 spec; emitting variability on a relationship is a contract violation
field-name tokens outside the relationship admitted set (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission) are rejected at FIELDS token binding time on form-8 specs
golden_groups: Crate form 8 specs decode to relationship specs at the expected property paths
targetPaths explicit / prepend / append / delete subfield decoding
None target as empty explicit listOp
rejection of variability and other forbidden fields (including deprecated noLoadHint / permission) on form-8 spec emits MalformedUsdcSection
